prompt: Design an A/B test for a new onboarding flow that we expect will improve 30-day retention from 40% to 45%. We currently get 500 new signups per day. Tell us everything we need to know before running this experiment.
_note: Tests statistical rigor: expects minimum sample size calculation, power analysis, test duration estimate, one vs. two-tailed decision, multiple testing correction considerations, and stopping rules. Baseline is likely to produce generic advice without the calculations.
